steps.name: Fix compilation error + start aichatsystem server at port 4002
steps.description: Fixed $fast_check→$avail_check in AI.pm chat action (line 1850). Confirmed AI.pm compiles cleanly. Started aichatsystem-ef4e at port 4002. Root cause identified: port 4001 was planningsystem branch, not aichatsystem.

steps.name: Test all implemented features at port 4002
steps.description: User must test the following at workstation.local:4002 and shanta.local:4002: (1) Chat widget visible on Shanta site with black border, (2) Thinking trace visible on all responses, (3) Errors saved to conversation history, (4) Model keep-alive 2h (no cold-start on warm models), (5) create_todo AI action works when AI is asked to create a todo.

steps.name: Merge aichatsystem-ef4e to main
steps.description: Once features are verified at port 4002, merge the branch to main. Key files changed: AI.pm, Ollama.pm, DBEncy.pm, local-chat.js, ai-chat.css, conversations.tt, TopDropListLogin.tt. Update todo #567 description to reflect full scope before merging.

steps.name: Planning System Integration (sub-task f1874939)
steps.description: Begin the 6-step Planning System Integration sub-task: (1) Audit current AI↔Planning state, (2) Add project_id/task_id to ai_conversations, (3) Inject project context into AI prompt, (4) Show AI activity on DailyPlan, (5) Link conversations to tasks, (6) End-to-end test.
